/home/mm8/Documents/OS/MM8/MM8-OS/toolchain/i686-elf/bin/i686-elf-gcc -T /home/mm8/Documents/OS/MM8/MM8-OS/src/kernel/linker.ld -nostdlib CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/apps/calc/calc.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/apps/editor/editor.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/gdt.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/idt.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/io.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/irq.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/isr.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/isrs_gen.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/keyboard.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/pic.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/screen_defs.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/commands/3dAniTest.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/commands/afk.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/commands/color.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/commands/command.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/commands/credits.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/commands/json.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/commands/mm8Splash.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/ctype.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/disk.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/fat.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/font.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/gprintf.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/graphics.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/hal/hal.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/heap.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/libs/cJSON/cJSON.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/main.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/math.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/memory.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/stdio.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/string.c.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/gdt.asm.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/idt.asm.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/io.asm.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/arch/i686/isr.asm.obj CMakeFiles/kernel.bin.dir/start.asm.obj -o kernel.bin  -lgcc
